apiKeys.createDescription: Create a new API key for programmatic access. The key will only be shown once.
apiKeys.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the API key "{name}"? Any applications using this key will immediately lose access. This action cannot be undone.
apiKeys.description: Manage API keys for programmatic access to your organization data
apiKeys.editDescription: Update the settings for this API key. Note: You cannot view or change the key itself.

empty.description: Create your first API key to enable programmatic access to your organization.
empty.title: No API Keys

form.enabledHelp: Disabled keys will reject all API requests
form.name: Name
form.nameHelp: A descriptive name to identify this key

apiKeys.name: Name

security.description: API keys provide full access to your organization data within their permission scope. Keep them secure and never share them in public repositories or client-side code.
security.title: Security Notice

apiKeys.showConfirmWarning: Are you sure? You haven't copied the key yet.
apiKeys.showDescription: Your new API key "{name}" has been created. Copy it now - you won't be able to see it again!
apiKeys.showWarning: This is the only time you will see this key. Make sure to copy and store it securely.
apiKeys.title: API Keys

appName.description: Override the default app name shown on the login page.
appName.title: App Name

background.description: Upload a custom background image for the login page.
background.hint: Recommended: 1920x1080px or larger, high quality JPEG or PNG
background.title: Background Image

colors.description: Customize the primary and accent colors for your login page.
colors.primaryHint: Used for buttons, links, and focus states
colors.title: Theme Colors

logo.description: Upload your organization logo to display on the login page.
logo.hint: Recommended: 200x200px, PNG or SVG with transparent background
logo.title: Logo

domains.addDescription: Add a custom domain to enable organization-specific login pages. You will need to verify ownership via DNS records.
domains.authConfigDescription: Configure which authentication methods are available for users signing in via {domain}
domains.cookieConsentScriptHelp: Injected on authentication pages for this custom domain only. Leave empty to disable.
domains.customDomainDescription: Configure a custom domain to enable an organization-specific login page with your branding.
domains.defaultUrlsDescription: These platform-managed URLs work automatically without custom DNS setup.
domains.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{domain}"? This action cannot be undone. Users will no longer be able to sign in via this custom domain.
domains.description: Configure your organization's custom login domain, branding, and SSO providers.
domains.dnsPropagationDescription: DNS changes can take up to 48 hours to propagate, though they often complete within a few minutes. You can click "Verify" once you have added the TXT record.
domains.domainHelp: Enter the domain where users will access the login page.
domains.domainInvalid: Please enter a valid domain (e.g., login.example.com)
domains.emailPasswordHelp: Allow users to sign in with email and password

guidedSetup.description: Configure SSO, SCIM, access policy, and activation checks in one guarded flow.
guidedSetup.title: Guided setup

domains.keepExistingSecretKey: Leave empty to keep existing secret key
domains.secretKeyRequired: Required when setting a site key
domains.socialProvidersHelp: Enable social login options for this domain
domains.title: Custom Domain & Branding
domains.tokenExpiredDescription: The verification token has expired. Please regenerate a new token.
domains.turnstileHelp: Bot protection for auth forms. Required for enterprise domains.
domains.txtRecordInstruction: Add the following TXT record to your DNS:
domains.verifyOwnershipDescription: Add a DNS TXT record to verify ownership of {domain}

email.apiKeyHint: Leave blank to keep existing key. Get your API key from resend.com
email.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this email configuration?
email.description: Configure a custom email provider for your organization. All organization emails will use this configuration instead of the system default.
email.passwordHint: Leave blank to keep existing password
email.scalewayConnectedDesc: This organization has a verified Scaleway Key Manager key for encrypted secret storage.
email.scalewayKeyPendingDesc: A Scaleway organization key will be generated when you save a secret such as a Resend API key or SMTP password.
email.scalewayUnavailableDesc: The configured Scaleway organization key could not be verified. Secrets cannot be stored securely until this is fixed.
email.smtpIpModeHint: Use Auto unless your SMTP provider requires a specific IP family.
email.testEmailRequired: Please enter a test email address
email.title: Email Configuration
email.vaultConnectedDesc: Secrets are stored securely in HashiCorp Vault.
email.vaultSealedDesc: HashiCorp Vault is sealed. Please unseal it to store secrets.
email.vaultUnavailableDesc: HashiCorp Vault is not available. Secrets cannot be stored securely.

accessPolicy.description: Set domain, invite, and SSO enforcement after the pilot test passes.
accessPolicy.requireSsoHelp: Employees must use the enterprise IdP.
accessPolicy.restrictDomainHelp: Block accounts outside the selected domain.
accessPolicy.restrictInvitesHelp: Only allow invitations aligned with access policy.
accessPolicy.title: Access Policy

domain.description: Validate the tenant boundary before enforcing SSO for employees.
domain.help: DNS verification uses the existing SSO domain verification actions. Complete that verification before activating enforcement.
domain.title: Domain

hero.description: Configure SSO, SCIM, and enforcement for organization {organizationId} with guarded activation.
hero.title: Operational command checklist

provider.description: Choose the identity provider preset, protocol, provider ID, and email domain.

generic.description: Use any standards-compliant OIDC or SAML 2.0 identity provider.

googleWorkspace.description: Use Google Workspace OIDC for SSO and optional directory sync.

microsoftEntra.description: Use Microsoft Entra ID for enterprise SSO and optional provisioning.

okta.description: Use Okta Workforce Identity for SAML or OIDC single sign-on.

provider.title: Provider

review.description: Review guarded activation checks before enabling enterprise identity controls.
review.lockoutWarningHelp: Confirm your current admin account can sign in through the configured provider before activation. Enforcement may block password fallback for the selected domain.
review.prerequisitesComplete: Provider, verified domain, and SSO test prerequisites are complete.
review.title: Review & Activate

scim.cardDescription: Generate the provisioning token and monitor connection health.
scim.description: SCIM verification updates after your identity provider sends a test user or group change.

error.saveProviderFirst: Save provider before generating a SCIM token

scim.title: SCIM Provisioning

sso.description: Register the external IdP using OIDC client credentials or SAML metadata.

error.saveProviderFirst: Save provider and domain before registering SSO

ssoTest.description: Record the result of a live external SSO test before enforcement.

error.saveProviderFirst: Save provider before recording a test

ssoTest.help: This records a live external SSO test result. Run the login in the IdP first, then capture pass or fail here for the activation guard.
ssoTest.title: Test User

enterprise.keepExistingSecretHelp: Leave blank to keep the existing secret

socialOAuth.addDescription: Configure your own OAuth app for social login.
socialOAuth.appleKeyIdHelp: The Key ID associated with your private key
socialOAuth.appleKeyIdRequired: Key ID is required for Apple
socialOAuth.appleTeamIdHelp: Found in your Apple Developer account
socialOAuth.appleTeamIdRequired: Team ID is required for Apple
socialOAuth.description: Configure your own OAuth credentials for social login. This allows your users to sign in using your organization's OAuth apps instead of shared credentials.
socialOAuth.empty: No custom social OAuth providers configured.
socialOAuth.emptyDescription: Add your own OAuth credentials to replace the shared credentials.

instructions.addProvider: Add the provider here with your credentials
instructions.copyCredentials: Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
instructions.createApp: Create an OAuth app in the provider's developer console
instructions.customDomain: Users signing in via your custom domain will use your OAuth app

socialOAuth.removeDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to remove this OAuth configuration? Users will fall back to the shared OAuth credentials (if available).
socialOAuth.title: Social Login Providers

sso.addDescription: Configure an OIDC identity provider for enterprise single sign-on.
sso.deleteDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this SSO provider? Users will no longer be able to sign in using this identity provider.
sso.description: Add OIDC identity providers to enable SSO for your organization.
sso.domainInvalid: Please enter a valid domain (e.g., example.com)
sso.emailDomainHelp: Users with this email domain will be able to use SSO
sso.emptyDescription: Add an OIDC provider to enable enterprise single sign-on.

instructions.copyCredentials: Copy the Issuer URL, Client ID, and Client Secret from your IdP
instructions.createApp: Create an OIDC application in your identity provider (Okta, Azure AD, etc.)
instructions.verifyDomain: Add the provider here and verify the email domain via DNS TXT record

sso.issuerUrlHelp: The OIDC issuer URL from your identity provider
sso.providerIdHelp: A unique identifier for this provider (lowercase, no spaces)
sso.providerIdInvalid: Provider ID must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
sso.title: Identity Providers
sso.tokenError: Failed to generate domain verification token
sso.verifyError: Domain verification failed. Check your DNS TXT record and retry.

enterpriseIdentitySetup.description: Guide SSO, SCIM provisioning, domain restrictions, invite policy, and default roles for this organization.
